games.name: BTS World Tour 'ARIRANG' - Arlington
games.description: BTS return to the road with their 'ARIRANG' world tour, the group's first outing with all seven members since their military service. The Arlington run brings two stadium shows to AT&T Stadium on August 15 and 16, 2026, both starting at 8:00 PM. These Texas dates are part of a sprawling 2026-2027 tour of roughly 79 shows across 34 regions. Both nights sold out during the initial January on-sale, so seats are now only available through resale.

games.name: Foo Fighters: Take Cover Tour - Detroit
games.description: Foo Fighters open their 2026 Take Cover Tour on August 6 at Ford Field in Detroit, kicking off a stadium run that stretches to September 26 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas. Queens of the Stone Age serve as direct support across the trek, which stops at NFL stadiums and ballparks including Soldier Field, Lincoln Financial Field and Nissan Stadium. Tickets for the Detroit opener and other dates are on sale through Ticketmaster.

games.name: My Chemical Romance: The Black Parade 2026 - New York
games.description: My Chemical Romance mark the 20th anniversary of their album The Black Parade with an expanded 2026 stadium tour. The North American leg resumes on August 9 at Citi Field in New York and wraps on October 24 with a three-night stand at the Hollywood Bowl in Los Angeles. Rotating support across the dates includes Iggy Pop, Babymetal, Pierce the Veil, The Mars Volta, Franz Ferdinand and Jimmy Eat World. Tickets went on general sale September 26, 2025.

games.name: Ariana Grande: The Eternal Sunshine Tour - London (The O2 Residency)
games.description: Ariana Grande caps her 2026 Eternal Sunshine Tour with a European-exclusive residency at The O2 in London. The run spans 10 nights between August 15 and September 1, 2026, the longest single-venue stretch of her career and her first UK performances since 2019. The shows support her album Eternal Sunshine and its deluxe follow-up, Brighter Days Ahead. All 10 London dates sold out, leaving resale as the only remaining option.

games.name: Austin City Limits Music Festival 2026
games.description: Austin City Limits returns for its 25th anniversary across two weekends, October 2-4 and October 9-11, 2026, at Zilker Park in Austin. The lineup is headlined by Charli XCX, Rufus Du Sol, Twenty One Pilots, Lorde and The XX, with Skrillex topping Weekend 1 and Kings of Leon topping Weekend 2. Other acts include Turnstile, Labrinth, The Chainsmokers, Young Miko and Bleachers. Three-day passes and premium packages are on sale now.

games.name: ENHYPEN: Blood Saga World Tour - Oakland
games.description: ENHYPEN bring their fourth world tour, Blood Saga, to Oakland Arena for two nights on July 28 and 29, 2026, both starting at 7:30 PM with doors at 6:00 PM. The North American leg follows the seven-member group's 2025 WALK THE LINE tour, which sold out its US and European legs, and continues on to Las Vegas after Oakland. ENGENE membership presale ran April 22-23, with general on-sale opening April 24 via Ticketmaster and AXS.

games.name: Monsta X: THE X : NEXUS World Tour - New York
platforms: Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden, New York, NY
games.description: Monsta X bring THE X : NEXUS, their 2026 world tour, to the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden on October 6, with doors at 7:00 PM and the show starting at 8:00 PM. The North American leg runs October 3-24 across ten cities including Fairfax, Boston, Toronto and Los Angeles, following the tour's launch with three sold-out nights at Seoul's KSPO Dome and stops across Asia and Latin America. Tickets have been on sale since April 14 through Ticketmaster.

games.name: Charli xcx: Music, Fashion, Film Tour - Philadelphia
games.description: Charli xcx opens her Music, Fashion, Film Tour at Xfinity Mobile Arena in Philadelphia on September 11, 2026, at 8:00 PM, in support of her seventh studio album of the same name. The arena run continues across North America into late October, including two-night stands in Brooklyn and Los Angeles, with underscores as support on every date. An artist presale ran June 12 at 9:00 AM, followed by general on-sale the same day at 1:00 PM through Ticketmaster, including $20 'Angel Tickets.'

games.name: Phoebe Bridgers: The Lost Tour - Indianapolis
games.description: Phoebe Bridgers brings The Lost Tour to Indianapolis for two nights, September 14 and 15, 2026, at Gainbridge Fieldhouse, with both shows starting at 7:30 PM. The completely phone-free arena tour supports her third studio album, Lost Weekend, and runs through North America before continuing to the UK and Europe in November. Alex G opens the North American dates, and all phones and smartwatches are secured in Yondr pouches for the duration of each show. Tickets went on sale June 12 at 10:00 AM ET.

games.name: Lollapalooza 2026
games.description: Lollapalooza returns to Grant Park in Chicago for four days, July 30 to August 2, 2026, with more than 150 acts across seven stages under a 10-year city contract extension. Daily headliners are Lorde and John Summit on Thursday, Charli xcx and The Smashing Pumpkins on Friday, Olivia Dean and Jennie of Blackpink on Saturday, and Tate McRae and The xx on Sunday. The bill also features Turnstile, Aespa, Clipse, YOASOBI and Yungblud. Four-day passes are waitlisted, but single-day tickets remain on sale.

games.name: Charli xcx - Music, Fashion, Film
games.description: Charli xcx releases her seventh studio album, Music, Fashion, Film, on July 24, 2026, via Atlantic Records, produced with longtime collaborators A. G. Cook and Finn Keane. The album was preceded by three singles: lead track 'Rock Music,' followed by 'SS26' and 'Wink Wink.' Its black-and-white cover features John Cale, Marc Jacobs and Martin Scorsese as emblems of the title's three disciplines. Charli supports the release with an eponymous North American arena tour running September and October.

games.name: Avenged Sevenfold & Good Charlotte - Belmont Park, NY
games.description: Avenged Sevenfold and Good Charlotte co-headline a 16-date North American summer run, stopping at UBS Arena in Belmont Park, New York on August 10, 2026. The tour opened July 25 in Ridgedale, Missouri and closes August 27 in Phoenix, pairing the Orange County metal band with the pop-punk veterans. Tickets went on general sale December 12, 2025 through the two acts' official websites, following a Deathbats Club and early-access presale.

games.name: Ringo Starr & His All Starr Band - Forest Hills, NY
games.developer: Ringo Starr & His All Starr Band
games.description: Ringo Starr and His All Starr Band bring their fall 2026 North American run to Forest Hills Stadium in Queens, New York on October 1, 2026. The ten-date trek opens September 24 in Easton, Pennsylvania and wraps October 7 in Albany. The 2026 lineup features Steve Lukather, Colin Hay, Warren Ham, Hamish Stuart, Gregg Bissonette and Buck Johnson. General tickets went on sale July 10, 2026 at 10 a.m. local time through Ticketmaster.

games.name: Brandon Flowers - Thrasher
games.description: The Killers frontman Brandon Flowers releases Thrasher, his third solo album and first in over a decade, on August 21, 2026 via Island Records. Recorded in Nashville at Historic RCA Studio A with producers Shawn Everett and Jonathan Rado, the record leans toward country and features guitarist David Rawlings, pedal-steel player Bruce Bouton and 85-year-old harmonica veteran Charlie McCoy. It follows 2010's Flamingo and 2015's The Desired Effect.

games.name: Kasabian - ACT III
games.description: Leicester rock band Kasabian release their ninth studio album, ACT III, on September 4, 2026. The record was pushed back from its original July 17 date after the band chose to make final adjustments, saying they couldn't send it out 'without getting everything just right.' It follows 2024's Happenings, with Serge Pizzorno again handling lead vocals since Tom Meighan's 2020 departure.
